description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named benchmarks that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to build and benchmark a project with different compilers (clang, gcc), versions (20, 14), and configurations (xsimd, xsimd-tbb). For each job, install the required compiler, checkout the code, set up a conda environment, configure the project using CMake, build the benchmark target, and run the benchmark with a 10-minute timeout.
